# Sender authentication

*Internet Security*. The process that shows ISPs that you gave your mailbox provide permission to send emails on your behalf. To set up sender authentication, add DNS records to your hosting service.

This authentication involves both [domain authentication][domain-authentication] and [link branding][link-branding].

[link-branding]: /docs/glossary/link-branding

[domain-authentication]: /docs/glossary/domain-authentication
